ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "website" TEXT /* Artist's website URL */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the artist in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the album is associated with */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "producers" TEXT /* Producers of the album in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number the track is located on */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the disc */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the playlist in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, pause, skip) */,
  "interaction_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Context of the interaction (e.g., playlist, album, radio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main artist */,
  "collaborating_artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating artist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track featuring the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., featured artist, producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_collaborating_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborating_artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., genre, mood, tempo) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., rock, happy, fast) */,
  "feature_weight" REAL /* Weight of the feature (e.g., 0.5 for a secondary genre) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audio format */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the audio format */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_audio" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio format */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the audio file */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the audio file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_audio_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_audio_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES audio_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playback_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playback statistic */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been skipped */,
  "last_played_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last played */,
  "total_playback_time" INTEGER /* Total playback time of the track in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playback_stats_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playback_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playback history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "playback_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was played */,
  "playback_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of playback in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playback_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playback_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track affected by the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected by the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., ban, delete, warn) */,
  "action_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
